3338190.name: Ducky Clicker Idle Game
3338190.description:
Ducky Clicker – Build the ultimate rubber duck empire!
In Ducky Clicker, every click brings you closer to creating the largest rubber duck empire. This Cookie Clicker-inspired idle game combines clicker strategy with the fun of collecting over 2,000 unique themed ducks.

Massive Collection: Explore and unlock ducks with special stories and abilities, from Quantum Ducks to Duck Gods ruling the multiverse.

Upgrades and Powers: Enhance your clicks and strategies with unique abilities and quantum combos.

Visual Style: A colorful aesthetic highlighting every detail of the ducks and settings.

Offline Progress and Cloud Sync.

Perfect for idle game and collection fans, Ducky Clicker offers hours of entertainment, challenges, and an incredible variety of ducks!
3338190.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
